title: Apathy
description: Make mobs apathetic. Apathy can be redefined
body:
Make mobs apathetic until you attack. As simple as one mod can get. Behaviour of a given mob can be configured: - Do nothing until attacked - Target player when the specific block is broken in a radius - Target player when the specific item+amount (can be any) is selected in a radius
Configuration example here: https://github.com/nk2IsHere/apathy/blob/master/README.md

P.S.: Requires Fabric, Fabric API and Minecraft 1.18.x Icon by Freepik (flaticon.com)
